  "claims": [
    "SB 735 establishes a first-in-the-nation regulatory process for keeping workers safe in motion picture productions.",
    "The bill establishes clear, mandatory guidelines around the use of firearms and ammunition on film sets.",
    "SB 735 establishes training requirements and safety standards for handling prop firearms and blanks.",
    "The use of live ammunition on sets is prohibited except in the most limited circumstances.",
    "The five-year Safety on Set pilot program requires employers receiving a motion picture tax credit to hire an independent safety advisor."
